name: first_diagnosis_precision
goal: Make first diagnosis output specific enough for students while keeping question generation optional.
fixed_issue: Fallback or partial AI analysis showed generic text such as '정밀 분석 필요' for power-root PDF submissions.

new_behavior.first_diagnosis: Shows topic-specific diagnosis for power/root materials: even-odd n, sign of base, principal value vs all solutions, rational exponent conversion, and original-condition checking.
new_behavior.student_action_steps: Adds a '학생이 바로 할 일' block to the first diagnosis screen.
new_behavior.question_generation: Still remains separate and optional after first diagnosis.

expected_first_diagnosis_title: 거듭제곱근 조건 판정과 주값/해 구분 확인 필요
